audience: Self-employed professionals, SMEs and marketing teams that want service and knowledge content to answer concrete customer questions more clearly
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Een KMO leren hoe echte zoekvragen worden omgezet in heldere antwoordformaten die bruikbaar, vindbaar en meetbaar zijn

searchIntent.question: What is AEO and how can an SME turn real customer questions into clear, useful and measurable website answers?
searchIntent.geographicContext: English-speaking SMEs in Limburg, Belgium and the wider web market

longTailKeywords: answer customer questions on a website
directAnswer: AEO stands for Answer Engine Optimisation: organising content so a specific question receives a clear, accurate and useful answer quickly. It helps visitors, traditional search results and systems that summarise answers. AEO is an editorial discipline within strong SEO, not a separate trick or a guarantee of a featured snippet or AI mention.
title: What is AEO? Building content that answers direct questions clearly
metaDescription: What is AEO? Learn to analyse questions, write direct answers, understand snippets and measure answer-focused content without AI tricks or guarantees.
h1: What is AEO? Building content that answers direct questions clearly

internalLinks.anchor: local SEO for SMEs in Limburg

factsToPreserve: AEO does not guarantee a featured snippet, citation, AI mention or fixed answer position
AEO does not impose a universal word limit on direct answers
SEO remains the technical and content foundation, while AEO emphasises question analysis and answer format
Google says the same SEO foundations apply to AI Overviews and AI Mode and there are no extra technical requirements
Google primarily creates snippets from page content and may use the meta description when it fits better
Structured data must describe visible page content and does not improve a weak answer or guarantee a result
Google stopped showing FAQ rich results from 7 May 2026; this claim was reverified against official Google documentation on 18 July 2026
Answer quality requires accuracy, completeness, standalone clarity, audience fit and a useful next step
No single metric provides a universal AEO score
Citations and referrals do not by themselves establish authority, causality or business value
